title: Role Based Access Control Good Practices — Listing secrets
text:
It is generally clear that allowing
get
access on Secrets will allow a user to read their contents.
It is also important to note that
list
and
watch
access also effectively allow for users to reveal the Secret contents.
For example, when a List response is returned (for example, via
kubectl get secrets -A -o yaml
), the response
includes the contents of all Secrets.
